input.prompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

data.content: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-06T00:46:38.335Z</current_datetime>

I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

input.initialPrompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: dotnet new search grpc 2>/dev/null || echo "dotnet not available"
arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

arguments.command: dotnet new list grpc 2>/dev/null || echo "no local templates"

data.reasoningText: The user wants to find gRPC templates for .NET. I'll search for available templates both locally installed and on NuGet.org.

arguments.command: dotnet new search grpc 2>/dev/null || echo "dotnet not available"
arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

arguments.command: dotnet new list grpc 2>/dev/null || echo "no local templates"

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search grpc 2>/dev/null || echo \"dotnet not available\"", "description": "Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new list grpc 2>/dev/null || echo \"no local templates\"", "description": "List locally installed gRPC templates", "initial_wait": 15}

toolArgs.command: dotnet new list grpc 2>/dev/null || echo "no local templates"

data.content:
You already have the **built-in** ASP.NET Core gRPC template installed:

```
Template:   ASP.NET Core gRPC Service
Short Name: grpc
Language:   C#
```

Create a new project with:
```bash
dotnet new grpc -o MyGrpcService
```

**No extra package needed** — the `grpc` template ships with the .NET SDK. If you want a more opinionated/community template from NuGet, popular options include:

| Package | Short Name | Downloads |
|---------|-----------|-----------|
| `EMG.Templates` | `emg-grpc-service` | 16k |
| `JMI.DotNet10.GRPC.API.Template.CSharp` | `grpc10` | <1k (newest) |

Install one with e.g. `dotnet new install EMG.Templates`, but for most cases the built-in `grpc` template is the right choice.
